objective: Accelerate Deal Velocity Through AI-Powered, Policy-Led Approvals

krs.label: Average Approval Cycle Time
krs.description: Time from submission to approval decision (all tiers)

krs.label: First-Pass Approval Rate
krs.description: Deals approved without revision on first submission

krs.label: Exception Rate
krs.description: Deals requiring escalation beyond standard tier path

krs.label: Seller Productivity
krs.description: Average deals processed per seller per week

krs.label: Deal Score Accuracy
krs.description: AI deal score correlation with post-delivery outcomes

krs.label: AI Recommendation Adoption
krs.description: Approval decisions aligned with AI recommendation

tiers.label: Streamlined Self-Serve
tiers.description: Policy-compliant deals are auto-approved by the AI engine with audit trail.

tiers.label: Manager Review
tiers.description: AI-pre-scored and pre-approved in principle; manager confirms conditions and signs.

tiers.label: Executive Committee
tiers.description: Full committee review with AI briefing package. AI recommends, executives decide.
